name: M:GTA.ShapeTest.StartTestSweptSphere(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,System.Single,GTA.IntersectFlags,GTA.Entity,GTA.ShapeTestOptions)
summary: Start a shape test against the area where swept sphere (ellipsoid) for shape test covers.
value:
The shape test handle.
            If this method fails to create the shape test request because there are too many ongoing requests,

params.name: startPosition
params.description: The positon where the shape test starts.

params.name: endPosition
params.description: The positon where the shape test ends.

params.name: radius
params.description: The radius of the swept sphere.

params.name: intersectFlags
params.description: What type of objects the shape test should intersect with.

params.name: options
params.description: Specify options for the spape test.
